feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Time-Dependent Days of Supply.
entry.content:
The settings have been configured as follows, But "Checking the Safety Stock in the Stock/Requirements List" screen can't see there are three lines representing the Time-Dependent Safety Stock.

1.The material master is set to Time-Dependent Days of Supply.

2.In Maintain Time-Dependent Stock Levels, an interval has been added using Add.

entry.title: Upload functionality for debit/credit material (MR22)
entry.content: Apps "Manage material valuaiton" provides the function "Debit/Credit Material" but i can't find  upload functionality.  The MR22 upload functionality is useful during inventory data migration with scope item 33Q(Actual costing). Is there any workaround or will it release in the near future.

entry.title: Unable to connect BAS to S4HANA Public Cloud system
entry.content:
Hello ,

I am trying to connect BAS to a S4HANA public cloud system using SAML assertion destination , by following tutorial : Connect SAP Business Application Studio and SAP S/4HANA Cloud System 

In destination cockpit the destination connects successfully . However , when I am trying to connect to the system ( saml destination ) in BAS ( using adaption project ) , I am getting following error : The system that you have selected cannot be detected to be of type OnPremise or of type CloudReady. You should select system of either of both types in order to continue with the generation of the project.

Is there any configuration that I am missing in the S4HANA cloud system .

entry.title: Looking for a list of master data objects which are covered on the MDG Cloud edition
entry.content:
I am looking for a list of master data objects which are covered in MDG Cloud Edition, showing what is covered in Public cloud and what is covered in Private cloud.

Is there any documentation which can provide me these details?

entry.title: slow-moving indicator - wrong value
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

during SAP public cloud implementation we found differences in Slow or Non-moving materials app.

Based on the SAP help https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/32da8359c8ee4e8b8e8c5e15cacba5aa/276b1b645ec64e808e430b363d6efd6b.html?profile=20087413&source=productlink-webassistant the value for slow-moving indicator should be 5,49. But in the system, we have value 5,14.

Qcons = 45

Qstock = 19955

NOdays = 15

 

Do you have any ideas about what could cause these differences?

entry.title: I need to send the information displayed by the app "monitor purchase order item" via email?
entry.content:
Hello. I need to send the information displayed by the app "monitor purchase order item" like a report via email, it's possible?

Regards.

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Rounding Profile is not coming up
entry.content:
Hello Members, 

I am executing Scope Item J45 (Procurement of Direct Materials), and setting up Rounding Profile via CBC. It seems that Rounding Profile ZT01 has been created because when I type the value below and click [Static] button then the error message shows up.

However, there are no matching items on Purchasing Info Record. 

Are there any further steps that I have to execute to show up the settings?

Best,

entry.title: How to download dunning reminder
entry.content:
Hello Members,

I am executing Scope Item J45(Procurement of Direct Materials) and want to download Dunning Reminder. However, the status is [In Preparation] and PDF mark is not available. 

Thank you in advance for your help

entry.title: SSCUI 102336 doesn't exist on CBC
entry.content:
I am following a video from ( https://microlearning.opensap.com/media/Workflow+for+Payment+Approval+-+SAP+S+4HANA+Cloud/1_440d7me3 ). But I stopped because the video was configured with SSCUI 102336 Settings for Payment Approval Processes / Define Settings for Bank Account Master Data and after I searched for SSCUI 102336 it wasn't there on CBC.

then I found out via Google https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3130880 which told me I had to add business catalog ID SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_FIN_CM0_PC under BPC_EXPERT,

and I did it but SSCUI 102336 still didn't appear on CBC.

Thank You

entry.title: Data loss occured when converting 2024 Error
entry.content:
Hi everyone,when im executing "journalentrybulkclearingreques"API in Public Cloud system,im getting error message given below.Does anyone know the cause of this error.

Regards,

entry.title: Job template “Production Settlement in Parallel Ledgers” is not available
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are working on Bolt Testing in SAP Cloud Tenant for the test script BEI Period End Closing – Plant. While doing the step (Schedule Production Settlement in Parallel Ledgers), we have to create a new product costing job named “Production Settlement in Parallel Ledgers” in “Schedule Product Costing Jobs” application and the job template “Production Settlement in Parallel Ledgers” is not available in the list. we have attached the screenshot of the error.

Can you please help with this?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Dear Experts
entry.content:
We are using SAP S/4 HANA Cloud and needs to know what replaced tramsaction ME54N, We needs to know this app in SAP Hana Coud for our BPO be able to approve PR's on behalf of users who are unable to approve or did not set up substitutes. We have been using this transaction ME54N duiring time when we were still on SAP ECC.
Thanks
Gauta Makgopya

entry.title: planning versus budget enterprise project
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Can somebody explain to me the difference between budget (BUDGET01) and planning (PLN). Both are possible for to upload an excel sheet, but for the budget I can create an item direct in the system. I want to understand the SAP logic. If I see it correctly the PLN is used for the POC calculation, so is my understanding correct that you have to update you ETC via an excel sheet in Enterprise Projects (project with revenue)

Thanks,

Best regards,

Rene

entry.title: Inter company payments in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Can you please guide me on how intercompany payments work in S/4HANA Public Cloud with configuration guide. When you have 4 company codes, and one company (let's say Company A) is paying another companies (let's say Company C) investment activities. 

Thank you.

entry.title: IRN generation for B2C scenario from eDocument Cockpit
entry.content:
Why are eDocuments not created for the B2C scenarios in the eDocument Cockpit? How to generate IRN for the B2C scenarios?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Multi Plant Production
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

Business Scenario: 

The company has 2 plants located in different geographical locations A and B. The same products are produced at both plants (both MTO and MTS scenarios are present), and dispatching is also done from both plants. However, the Sales orders are recorded at Plant A. MRP and Variant Configuration are to be used. 

Q: How do we manage and distribute the Production orders across these plants?  

Product: SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 2402

Any help is greatly appreciated. 

Thanks in Advance!

entry.title: Synchronous Goods Receipt with automatic Warehouse Task Creation (Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Hi all 

I am looking for a way to do the Synchronous goods receipt posting in SAP Public Cloud and also use the Automatic Warehouse Task Creation when the Goods Receipt is Posted.

i know to use this App(image below)  for the Synchronous Goods Posting but i am unsure what to configure for the automatic warehouse task creation. But i don't know what o Configure in Configure your solution. 

 

 

 

I Set the automcatic WT Task creation to active in Maintain Storage types but it does not seem to change a thing.

entry.title: tax code filed mandatory in po screen
entry.content:
Hi team,

we have business requirement to make it tax code mandatory in manage purchase order or me21 screen please suggest the ways.

entry.title: Report for Actual WIP
entry.content: We have activate 3F0 and 33Q. After monthly closing, there has no report about actual WIP like COMLWIPDISP(Display WIP in actial value) in OP edition. Is there any workaround or will it release in near future.

entry.title: Use business user rather than communication user for CDS oData call in MS Excel
entry.content:
Hello community,

on this community page, there are some blogs dealing with the integration of API calls into MS Excel, e.g. https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/s-4hana-cloud-integration-an-instructive-example/ba-p/13380764.

However, all of these tutorials use a communication user rather than a named business user (CB...). In our case, we want several business users to use this feature in MS Excel, however, the system has to deliver only data filtered on the individual authorizations/restrictions of each user (e.g. based on company code, sales org, ...).

Any idea on how to achieve this?

Thanks & regards

Wolfgang
